op_log_operator_insert.name: op_log_operator_insert
op_log_operator_insert.withCheck: current_user_role() = 'operator' AND company_id = current_company_id() AND log_type IN ('start', 'complete')

op_log_qc_insert.name: op_log_qc_insert
op_log_qc_insert.withCheck: current_user_role() = 'qc' AND company_id = current_company_id() AND log_type = 'qc'

running_ops_operator_write.name: running_ops_operator_write
running_ops_operator_write.using: current_user_role() = 'operator' AND company_id = current_company_id() AND created_by = (current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true)::jsonb->>'sub')::uuid
